p.strong: Implementation Specification for RFC 793 (TCP), RFC 791 (IPv4), RFC 826 (ARP)

ol.li: Big Endian: All network headers must use htons() / htonl().
Alignment: Ensure IP header starts at 2-byte offset to align 4-byte fields.
Checksums: TCP checksum must include Pseudo-IP header.
RTO: Use Karn's Algorithm; do not sample retransmitted segments.
